raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.7,"R1.2":0.7,"R1.3":1.0,"R1.4":0.7,"R1.5":0.0,"R1.6":0.3,"R1.7":0.3,"RX.1":1.0,"RX.2":1.0,"RX.3":1.0,"RX.4":1.0,"RX.5":1.0},"active_set":["R1.1","R1.2","R1.3","R1.4","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"rationale":{"R1.1":"Any opinion on this paper requires reconstructing its thesis — panel-consensus filtering as a post-hoc enrichment mechanism — and its stated contribution claim before evaluating it.","R1.2":"The paper makes a causal inference chain (panel diversity → complementary signal → enrichment) and treats median Z-score as a 'calibrated bioactivity estimate'; both moves require logical scrutiny.","R1.3":"The empirical core consists of specific quantitative claims — 2.9–3.4× enrichment across three targets and ~30% ablation degradation — and whether the retrospective ChEMBL screen design actually supports those numbers is load-bearing for any scientific opinion.","R1.4":"Ensemble/panel methods and retrospective virtual screening are well-established; assessing the novelty delta over prior QSAR ensembles, multi-objective filters, and generative-pipeline post-processors is central to evaluating whether the contribution is meaningful."},"clarification_needed":true,"clarification_question":"Are you asking for a scientific and methodological critique of the paper's claims and evidence, or for feedback on its writing and presentation quality?"}

rationale.R1.1: Any opinion on this paper requires reconstructing its thesis — panel-consensus filtering as a post-hoc enrichment mechanism — and its stated contribution claim before evaluating it.
rationale.R1.2: The paper makes a causal inference chain (panel diversity → complementary signal → enrichment) and treats median Z-score as a 'calibrated bioactivity estimate'; both moves require logical scrutiny.
rationale.R1.3: The empirical core consists of specific quantitative claims — 2.9–3.4× enrichment across three targets and ~30% ablation degradation — and whether the retrospective ChEMBL screen design actually supports those numbers is load-bearing for any scientific opinion.
rationale.R1.4: Ensemble/panel methods and retrospective virtual screening are well-established; assessing the novelty delta over prior QSAR ensembles, multi-objective filters, and generative-pipeline post-processors is central to evaluating whether the contribution is meaningful.

parsed.clarification_question: Are you asking for a scientific and methodological critique of the paper's claims and evidence, or for feedback on its writing and presentation quality?
